title: callicarpa umbellata
intro: Callicarpa umbellata, also known as the purple bellwort or bellflower, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Callicarpa umbellata include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties.
